title: Miku Tinkaton
description: This is a resource pack for Cobblemon that changes Tinkaton to Miku!
body:
This Resource Pack changes all Tinkatons to Miku! Shiny Tinkaton is Sakura Miku. There are no variations for the Jukebox item custom texture added in Cobblemon 1.7, as I couldn't think of any. 

Her hammer is now a Leek, and I've edited the animations so they fit with the Leek.

Credit to faixfawn for the original idea and also also for the leek idea!!!

fishface55 has credit for doing nothing for this resource pack, Fonixen has credit for being generally cool but also not doing anything for this resource pack. (<- got asked to add these credits)
